400.description: Bad Request - Invalid email or password

example: The email field is required.
The email must be a valid email address.
The password field is required.
The password must be at least 6 characters.
The name field is required.
The name may not be greater than 100 characters.
The email field is required.
The email must be a valid email address.
The email has already been taken.
The phone field is required.
The phone has already been taken.

post.description: Logout the user and invalidate the token

Refreshes the JWT token for the authenticated user using the provided refresh token.
     *                  The new access token and refresh token will be returned in the response.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: User's current password and new password

400.description: Bad Request - The current password is incorrect

example: The current password field is required.
The new password field is required.
The new password must be at least 6 characters.
The new password confirmation does not match.
The new password must be different from the current password.
